title: StrawMan
description: Your Personal Punching Bag... ehh.. StrawMan
body:
## StrawMan With the Spear making an official entrance soon and
me being too dumb to understand how much damage I deal,
I created something that tells me instead **▔\\(ツ)/▔**
### HP To summon a StrawMan with limited HP: ```yml /strawman spawn hp ```
### Fire To summon a StrawMan that can only die from Fire Damage: ```yml /strawman spawn melee-proof ```
### Remove To remove spawned StrawMan: ```yml /strawman clear ```


That's it.
